steps.title: Set up a proportion using similar triangles
steps.content:
At the same moment, the sun's angle is identical for all objects. The Washington Monument and the cherry tree each form a right triangle with their respective shadows. These triangles are similar, so the ratios of height to shadow length are equal:
$$\frac{\text{Monument height}}{\text{Monument shadow}} = \frac{\text{Tree height}}{\text{Tree shadow}}$$
$$\frac{555}{300} = \frac{h}{16}$$

steps.title: Choose the closest answer
steps.content:
\(29.6\) feet rounds to \(30\) feet. Evaluate choices:
  • A: \(10\) — far below 29.6. Eliminated.
  • B: \(20\) — difference of 9.6 from 29.6. Eliminated.
  • C: \(30\) — difference of 0.4 from 29.6, the closest. That matches choice C — C is correct.
  • D: \(35\) — difference of 5.4 from 29.6. Eliminated.
